pi_items.source: setup_task.sh ffmpeg command duration flag and verifier.py EXPECTED_DUR constant
setup_task.sh ffmpeg sine frequency generator for english audio stream and verifier.py FREQ_ENG constant
setup_task.sh ffmpeg sine frequency generator for spanish audio stream and verifier.py FREQ_SPA constant
setup_task.sh ffmpeg sine frequency generator for french audio stream and verifier.py FREQ_FRA constant
Task instructions confirm these actions are inherently required to fulfill the goals.
Task description details these exact tags natively mapping to the requested actions and software used.
O*NET lookup confirms SOC 27-4011 maps to Audio and Video Technicians, verifying the post-production context.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated multi-track video file (festival_master.mp4). setup_task.sh explicitly uses ffmpeg to create a 60-second clip containing an English audio stream (440Hz tone, 48kHz, stereo), a Spanish stream (660Hz tone, 44.1kHz, stereo), and a French stream (880Hz tone, 44.1kHz, mono). These expected track frequencies, formats, and exact duration precisely match the bounds asserted in verifier.py.
